## Checklist

- [ ] JSON files are valid (`npm test` passes)
- [ ] Prices are numbers, not strings
- [ ] Enum fields use values from `schemas/` (power_consumption, battery type, category, interfaces, etc.)
- [ ] New device files follow the `{model}-{manufacturer}.json` naming convention
- [ ] Images are `.webp` format and under 200KB (if applicable)
